dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7908 IH: 20-Year Promise Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Kiggans of Virginia introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to provide for an additional 36 months of entitlement to educational assistance for individuals who serve 20 or more years in the Armed Forces, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the 20-Year Promise Act.

section.header: Additional months of entitlement to educational assistance

subsection.text: Section 3312 of title 38, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), by striking (b) and (c) and inserting (b), (c), and (d); and
by adding at the end the following new subsection:

subsection.header: Additional months of entitlement for certain individuals
subsection.text: Notwithstanding section 3695 of this title, an individual entitled to educational assistance under this chapter who serves an aggregate of 20 or more years in the Armed Forces, without regard to duty status, is entitled to a number of months of educational assistance under section 3313 of this title equal to 72 months.

subsection.header: Transfer of additional months of entitlement
subsection.text: Subsection (d) of section 3319 of such title is amended by striking 36 months and inserting 72 months for an individual eligible for additional months of entitlement under section 3312(d) of this title, and 36 months for all other individuals.

subsection.header: Limitation on period of assistance under two of more programs
subsection.text: Section 3695 of such title is amended by adding at the end the following new subsection:
The limitation in subsection (a) shall not apply to any individual eligible for additional months of entitlement under section 3312(d) of this title.

The amendments made by this Act shall apply with respect to an individual who, on or after the date of the enactment of this Act, completes an aggregate of 20 or more years of service in the Armed Forces, without regard to—

paragraph.text: when such individual joined the Armed Forces.
